open-password-protected-pdf-without-pass.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Password
open-password-protected-pdf-without-pass.description: Demonstrates how to attempt opening an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf without providing a password and handling the resulting InvalidPasswordException.

open-pdf-get-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to open a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf's Document constructor and retrieve the total number of pages.

open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save with Default Settings
open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file using Aspose.Pdf with default options.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, save it into a MemoryStream, and then copy the stream to a physical file on disk.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, append a new blank page, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-as-pdfx3.title: Export PDF as PDF/X-3 with Color Profiles
export-pdf-as-pdfx3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving ICC color profiles, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF Using User Password
decrypt-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, removing its encryption, and saving an unprotected copy.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while preserving the document's metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.description: Shows how to open a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to disable printing, and save the encrypted document.

remove-third-page-from-pdf.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page when present, and save the modified document.

insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF at a Specific Position
insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents, insert a page from one document into a specific position of the other using Aspose.Pdf, and save the result.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, and write the converted files (with optional error logs) to an output directory.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, modify its title metadata, and save the updated document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-form-filling-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
encrypt-pdf-form-filling-permission.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption that permits only form filling (disabling content extraction), and saving the protected document.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a multi‑page PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and the Pages collection.

create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add three blank pages, convert it to PDF/X‑3 format, and save the file, including cross‑platform handling for missing GDI+.

open-pdf-save-without-embedding-fonts.title: Open PDF and Save Without Embedding Fonts
open-pdf-save-without-embedding-fonts.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF via a FileStream, configuring save options to replace missing fonts with a system font, and saving the document without embedding fonts.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update Using Aspose.Pdf
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Demonstrates copying an existing PDF, opening it with a read‑write stream, appending a new page, and saving the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode to preserve the original content.

rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

compress-pdf-default-settings.title: Compress PDF Using Default Settings
compress-pdf-default-settings.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, save it using the default compression options, and compare the original and compressed file sizes.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and save the resulting file while handling missing files and conversion errors.

load-pdf-from-memorystream-set-version-1.title: Load PDF from MemoryStream and Convert to PDF 1.4
load-pdf-from-memorystream-set-version-1.description: The example demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, converting its PDF version to 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saving the result to the file system.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Using Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF via a FileInfo object, modify the Author metadata, and overwrite the original file using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-at-page-ten.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
split-pdf-at-page-ten.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages before and after a specified split point, and save each segment as separate PDF files with descriptive filenames.

batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs
batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.description: Shows how to open a collection of encrypted PDF files with a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies to an output folder.

download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF file using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document from a stream, and save it to the local file system.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set no permissions to disable printing, and verify the encryption status with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-stream.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with Passwords
encrypt-pdf-stream.description: Shows how to read a PDF from a stream, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and write the secured PDF back to another stream using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only (No Editing or Copying)
encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying a user password, leaving the owner password empty, and disabling all permissions such as editing and copying.

create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, and converts the file to PDF/A‑1b format while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

update-pdf-passwords.title: Update Passwords of an Encrypted PDF
update-pdf-passwords.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change its user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual one‑page PDF files by iterating over each page with Aspose.Pdf and saving each page as a new document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserving-icc-prof.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 Preserving ICC Profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserving-icc-prof.description: Demonstrates how to convert an existing PDF to PDF/X‑3 format using Aspose.Pdf while keeping any embedded ICC color profiles intact for accurate printing.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-embed-fonts.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (embedding any missing fonts), and save the resulting archival PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-high-optimization.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Level
compress-pdf-high-optimization.description: Loads a PDF, applies aggressive optimization (object compression, font subsetting, unused object removal) using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the result with PdfSaveOptions while reporting the size reduction.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to split a large PDF into separate one‑page PDF files, each stored in its own folder, using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords and saving the encrypted files to a separate directory.

set-pdf-document-title-verify.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
set-pdf-document-title-verify.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then re‑open it to confirm the title was persisted.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, restrict permissions to form filling only, encrypt it with AES‑256, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Metadata to PDF and Save
add-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, builds a custom XMP packet, attaches it to the document, and saves the file while preserving the new metadata.

split-pdf-into-sections-by-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
split-pdf-into-sections-by-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to read page‑range definitions from a text file, extract those pages from a source PDF, and save each range as a separate PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with High Compression
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf with file‑size optimization, and create a CSV summary report of the conversion results.

update-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-sa.title: Update PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
update-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-sa.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF version 1.5, and save the changes using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 with CMYK Color Space
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set up PdfFormatConversionOptions for PDF/X-3 compliance with a CMYK ICC profile, perform the conversion, and save the resulting file.

update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, replace the Author metadata with the current user name, and save the updated document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-config.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords from Configuration
batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-config.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration file containing multiple encryption jobs and encrypt each PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, while handling file validation and logging.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-filename-passwor.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with File‑Name Based Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-filename-passwor.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generate a unique password from each file name, and log the passwords securely.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (AES‑256)
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-aes256.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying an owner password only, using AES‑256 encryption and disabling all user permissions.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v3.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b__v3.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, and record the conversion outcome in a CSV log file.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Restrict to Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, and limit permissions to only form filling while disabling printing.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.description: Loads a PDF, applies 128‑bit RC4 encryption with specific permissions, saves the encrypted file, and checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

rotate-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-document-metadata.title: Set PDF Document Metadata (Author, Title, Subject) with Aspose.Pdf
set-pdf-document-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF, assign author, title, and subject information using Aspose.Pdf, save the file, and then verify the metadata by re‑opening the document.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-set-print-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Set Printing Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes128-set-print-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128 with Aspose.Pdf, assign printing and high‑quality printing permissions, and verify the encryption by opening the file with the user password.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.description: The example encrypts a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, restricts permissions to printing only, and programmatically verifies the security settings by attempting to open the file with and without passwords.
